cards.title: Ortho X-Ray Reading
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Systematic approach: ABCs (Alignment, Bone, Cartilage, Soft tissue)
  • Common fracture patterns
  • Osteoporosis grading (Singh index)
  • Bone tumour features

cards.title: 2D Echo Interpretation
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Ejection fraction: Normal >55%
  • Valvular lesions: Stenosis vs regurgitation
  • Wall motion abnormalities
  • Pericardial effusion grading

cards.title: USG Abdomen
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Liver: Size, echogenicity, lesions
  • Gallbladder: Stones, wall thickness, CBD
  • Kidneys: Size, cortex, hydronephrosis
  • FAST exam protocol

cards.title: Special Imaging (MRI/CT/DEXA)
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • CT chest: Lung windows, mediastinum
  • MRI brain: T1/T2/FLAIR interpretation
  • DEXA scan: T-score vs Z-score
  • When to refer for imaging

cards.title: ECG Interpretation
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Rate & rhythm assessment
  • P wave, PR interval, QRS, QT
  • STEMI vs NSTEMI pattern
  • Bundle branch blocks
